principle: Only incident-backed or foundational gates may block. Duplicate and unproven gates stay dormant; observational gates stay shadow.

activation_requirements: shadow observation before blocking unless foundational security
runtime_rules: active hooks must not call a model or network
heavy scans and full suites run offline only
dormant hooks do not execute or emit events by default

engine.done_gate.reason: Prevents false completion by requiring implementation, hard review evidence, protocol consistency and task-scoped proof.

engine.direct_completion_conflict.reason: Observe legacy result/implementation/review schema conflicts before owner-approved fail-closed activation; explicit false signals are already blocked by the primary direct completion gate.
engine.direct_completion_conflict.activation: Shadow by default; change to active only after owner approval and conflict-ledger review.

console.done_gate_meta.reason: Cheap invariant that task.true_done can only follow a passing primary DoneGate verdict.
console.done_gate_meta.activation: Always active for task.true_done; no model call and near-zero runtime cost.

acceptance-contract-consumers.reason: Prevents orchestrator acceptance atoms from being lost, generalized or polluted before implementation and review consume them.
acceptance-contract-consumers.activation: Always active only when an acceptance_contract is present; local structural comparison with no model or network call.

console.protocol_gate.reason: Primary DoneGate already calls ProtocolGate.validateCompletionProtocol before task.true_done.
console.protocol_gate.activation: Reactivate in shadow only if the primary DoneGate stops invoking ProtocolGate or an incident proves post-gate mutation.

console.hard_regression_coverage.reason: Primary DoneGate already validates incident-specific hard regression coverage; repeating it after true_done has produced no blocks.
console.hard_regression_coverage.activation: Reactivate in shadow only after a hard-regression bypass incident.

engine.loop_engineering_convergence.reason: Primary DoneGate already validates loop_engineering evidence when that feature is enabled.
engine.loop_engineering_convergence.activation: Reactivate in shadow only if loop completion moves outside primary DoneGate.

console.version_progress.reason: True completion with trusted releaseImpact must update the auditable version ledger exactly once.
console.version_progress.activation: Runs only after true completion; missing or manual releaseImpact remains a non-bumping manual path.
